  1. it.polimi.ingsw.am25

Uses of Package
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception

Description
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI

it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI
 
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI
    Class
    Description
    ActionNotAvailable
    Thrown when a player attempts an action that is not allowed in the current game phase or is not their turn to perform (e.g.
    EmptyMarketException
    Thrown when a player attempts to draw from a market row that contains no selectable cards (the row is either empty or contains only event cards).
    GameAlreadyLoadedException
    Thrown when attempting to load a new game while one is already active on the server.
    GameFullException
    Thrown when a player tries to join a lobby that has already reached its maximum player count.
    GameReadyToStartException
    Thrown when the last required player joins a lobby, signalling that the game is full and setupAndStartGame should be called immediately.
    NameOrColorAlreadyTakenException
    Thrown when a player tries to join with a nickname or totem color that is already in use by another player in the same lobby.
    NoGameToLoadException
    Thrown when the server attempts to resume a saved game but no save file is found.
    NotEnoughFoodException
    Thrown when a player attempts to purchase a card but does not have enough food to pay its cost.
    NotSelectableCardException
    Thrown when a player attempts to select a card type that cannot be chosen directly (e.g.
    TileOccupiedException
    Thrown when a player attempts to place their totem on an offer tile that is already occupied.

    Class
    Description
    EmptyMarketException
    Thrown when a player attempts to draw from a market row that contains no selectable cards (the row is either empty or contains only event cards).
    GameAlreadyLoadedException
    Thrown when attempting to load a new game while one is already active on the server.
    GameReadyToStartException
    Thrown when the last required player joins a lobby, signalling that the game is full and setupAndStartGame should be called immediately.

    Thrown when the server attempts to resume a saved game but no save file is found.

    Thrown when a player attempts to purchase a card but does not have enough food to pay its cost.

  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game
    Class
    Description
    DeckFinishedException
    Thrown when the card deck runs out of cards during market refresh, signalling that the game should transition to the final round.
    EmptyMarketException
    Thrown when a player attempts to draw from a market row that contains no selectable cards (the row is either empty or contains only event cards).
    EndGameException
    Thrown when the last round's resolve-action phase is complete, signalling that the game is over and winners should be calculated.
    EndOfPlacingPhaseException
    Thrown when all players have placed their totems on offer tiles, signalling that the placing phase is complete and the game should transition to the resolve-action phase.
    EndOfPlayingPhaseException
    Thrown when all players have resolved their offer-tile actions, signalling that the playing phase is complete and the game should transition to the next round.
    GameReadyToStartException
    Thrown when the last required player joins a lobby, signalling that the game is full and setupAndStartGame should be called immediately.
    NoMoreActionToDo
    Thrown when a player has exhausted all their available draw actions for the current turn, signalling that the turn should automatically advance to the next player.
    NotEnoughFoodException
    Thrown when a player attempts to purchase a card but does not have enough food to pay its cost.
    NotSelectableCardException
    Thrown when a player attempts to select a card type that cannot be chosen directly (e.g.
    TileOccupiedException
    Thrown when a player attempts to place their totem on an offer tile that is already occupied.

    Thrown when a player attempts to purchase a card but does not have enough food to pay its cost.
